{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163310D3D3EB6394F54CAAF82C"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400686526163895064","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，不雌竟，出彩女配多。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723115491,"group_id":"7350319107255847961","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"山重水复疑无路，柳暗花明又一村。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+XTVM2XkZNx/wz8bp3IEP50tSLXH7FWn9wAuGOyxP9j","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"1204704474047347","user_name":"阿一尘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1204704474047347","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350319107255847961","book_info":{"abstract":"【女强+古代+战争+种田+基建+点科技树+开疆扩土+无CP】
【女主战力爆表，全书最强战力】
被叛徒出卖的星际人柳元自爆而亡后却莫名复生在一个未知荒星上。
为早日重回母星，怀揣数十万年高级文明知识宝库的柳元，决定亲自动手改造这个还处于农耕封建社会时代的落后星球。
逃荒的人类体质孱弱打不过食人族？放心，我有改造药剂，一个打俩不成问题！
守护边关的将士被克扣军备军饷食不裹腹？别怕，我教你们培育高产粮食，锻造优质武器，自给自足。
忧国忧民的女皇遭奸人陷害濒临死亡？没事，让我扎一针就活蹦乱跳了。
这位陷害女皇的摄政王看我美若天仙想要强娶回家？来来来，给我电一下就老实了。
只会张嘴要吃的流民过度聚集会引起都城动荡？太好了，都送我这里来挖矿种地打螺丝……
朕，是真的只是想帮你们而已。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o333b1a66f00e12455dc6cb3b7ff61d64~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"秀秀向上","author_id":"","book_id":"7350319107255847961","book_name":"流落荒星，我在古代种田搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#984838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7389569443623338520","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"166540"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"74","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o333b1a66f00e12455dc6cb3b7ff61d64~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438790&x-signature=IMzkEH6bBn5cDX2p0kw1M9vplNQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4111823658288611","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.768217e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163310D3D3EB6394F54CAAF82C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3863,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":86},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401888 ",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350319107255847961","book_info":{"abstract":"【女强+古代+战争+种田+基建+点科技树+开疆扩土+无CP】
【女主战力爆表，全书最强战力】
被叛徒出卖的星际人柳元自爆而亡后却莫名复生在一个未知荒星上。
为早日重回母星，怀揣数十万年高级文明知识宝库的柳元，决定亲自动手改造这个还处于农耕封建社会时代的落后星球。
逃荒的人类体质孱弱打不过食人族？放心，我有改造药剂，一个打俩不成问题！
守护边关的将士被克扣军备军饷食不裹腹？别怕，我教你们培育高产粮食，锻造优质武器，自给自足。
忧国忧民的女皇遭奸人陷害濒临死亡？没事，让我扎一针就活蹦乱跳了。
这位陷害女皇的摄政王看我美若天仙想要强娶回家？来来来，给我电一下就老实了。
只会张嘴要吃的流民过度聚集会引起都城动荡？太好了，都送我这里来挖矿种地打螺丝……
朕，是真的只是想帮你们而已。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o333b1a66f00e12455dc6cb3b7ff61d64~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"秀秀向上","author_id":"","book_id":"7350319107255847961","book_name":"流落荒星，我在古代种田搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#984838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7389569443623338520","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"166540"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"74","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o333b1a66f00e12455dc6cb3b7ff61d64~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438790&x-signature=IMzkEH6bBn5cDX2p0kw1M9vplNQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4111823658288611","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"367"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323163310D3D3EB6394F54CAAF82C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23721,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":38631,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":89},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7400043563
